positive: A whimsical and modern illustration of a stylized forest scene. Central composition features silhouetted animals (deer, fox, raccoon) gathered beneath the glowing canopy of oversized bioluminescent mushrooms and leaves. The style should be clean, flat vector illustration with highly defined outlines and minimal gradient usage, resembling Nordic folk art meets contemporary children's book illustration. Lighting comes primarily from the soft, ethereal glow of the mushrooms, creating high contrast against the deep indigo and forest green background. Use jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) accented by creamy off-white highlights. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered for optimal print placement on apparel.
